name: Mercia Berkshire Dog Kennel & Run - 8 x 4ft
description: Mercia Berkshire Dog Kennel & Run - 8 x 4ft is great if you’re looking for somewhere outside to keep your dog throughout the warmer weather, then look no further than this 8 x 4ft Mercia Dog Run & Kennel. The mesh used in the front panel prevents any potential escape bids whilst allowing plenty of light and fresh air to enter the interior. The walls, floor and roof are made using interlocking 12mm Tongue & Groove cladding; this creates a solid structure that is guaranteed to offer many years of reliable service. Two doors feature in this dog kennel, one that enters the sheltered area and one that enters the open faced section. A small doorway connects the sheltered area and run itself so your dog is never restricted. The mesh used in the front of the panel is galvanised, this increases the longevity of the building. Supported by 28mm x 28mm interior framing, this garden dog run is extremely robust and is designed to comfortably withstand the harshest of weather conditions; the mineral roof felt we supply adds further protection against the elements. The floor tiles that feature in the kennel are completely removable, this makes it very easy to clean the inside; a drain hole in the middle of the floor prevents the build-up of water. Complete with a ten year anti rot guarantee, you can sit back and relax knowing that our products will last for many years to come. We recommend this building for smaller dogs. Manufactured here in the UK, using responsibly sourced timber.
breadcrumb: Mercia Berkshire Dog Kennel & Run - 8 x 4ft

name: Mercia Staffordshire Dog Kennel & Run - 8 x 6ft
description: Mercia 8 x 6ft Staffordshire dog kennel and run is ideal for those looking for an outdoor shelter that will make your dog feel cosy, safe and secure. A comfortable home just for them, to relax and recharge. Manufactured here in the UK, using responsibly sourced timber, you can be confident in the quality. This wooden pet house and run consists of two parts; an open mesh area to the front and a spacious shelter at the back. The two sections are connected by a stable door, to allow your dog freedom between sitting out and enjoying the fresh air, or snuggling up inside. Featuring a full height roof, not only does the dog run feel spacious and airy, but it also makes maintaining and cleaning the kennel simple and easy! The walls are manufactured using 12mm interlocking Shiplap tongue and groove boards; this provides a solid structure, guaranteed to offer years of reliable use. The floor is manufactured using smooth and strong interlocking boards, for a premium, high grade finish. A solid sheet board roof covers the entire building, and is finished with high quality mineral felt for long-lasting weatherproof protection. The mesh access door comes complete with a strong padbolt as well as turn buttons for added security. This building must be constructed on a firm level base such as concrete or concrete slabs.

name: Mercia Berkshire Dog Kennel & Run - 10 x 4ft
description: Mercia Berkshire Dog Kennel & Run - 10 x 4ft is great if you’re looking for a dog run that offers a great blend of space and build quality, then this 10 x 4ft Dog Run & Kennel will prove to be a great investment. The anti-snag mesh used in the front panel prevents your dog escaping whilst allowing plenty of light and fresh air to enter the interior. The walls, floor and roof are made using interlocking 12mm Tongue & Groove cladding; this creates a durable structure that is guaranteed to offer many years of service. Two doors feature in this dog kennel, one that enters the sheltered area and one that enters the open faced section. A small doorway connects the sheltered area and run itself so your dog is never restricted. The mesh used in the front of the panel is galvanised, this prevents rust becoming an issue over the years. Supported by 28mm x 28mm interior framing, this garden dog run is extremely robust and is designed to comfortably withstand challenging weather conditions; the mineral roof felt we supply adds further protection against potential weather damage. The floor tiles that feature in the kennel are completely removable, this makes it very easy to clean the inside; a drain hole in the middle of the floor prevents the build-up of water. Complete with a ten year anti rot guarantee for your peace of mind. We recommend this building for medium sized dogs. Manufactured here in the UK, using responsibly sourced timber.
breadcrumb: Mercia Berkshire Dog Kennel & Run - 10 x 4ft

name: Bond It Rendering Monster Mesh - Pink - 50m x 1m
description: Bond It Rendering Monster Mesh is an alkali resistant, glass-fibre woven mesh designed to reinforce render and basecoat plaster. It provides exceptional strength when embedded into wet base coat renders while remaining lightweight, tear resistant, and easy to handle. Ideal for stabilising surfaces and preventing cracking, it is widely used in external wall insulation systems, as well as for reinforcing roof tiles and carpets. To apply, first spread an even background coat of render to the desired thickness. Place the mesh into the wet render, pressing it in lightly with a trowel until fully embedded. Ensure joints overlap by a minimum of 5cm, then trowel over the surface to achieve the required finish.
breadcrumb: Bond It Rendering Monster Mesh - Pink - 50m x 1m

name: Bostik FIX A320 TACK Carpet Tile Tackifier Adhesive – 5kg
description: Bostik FIX A320 TACK is a solvent-free tackifier adhesive designed to provide a permanently tacky film when dry, which facilitates the easy removal and replacement of carpet tiles. With very low VOC emissions (EC1 Plus), it can be used to bond carpet tiles backed with PVC, polypropylene, and bitumen with fibre backing. This makes the adhesive particularly well suited to office environments and raised access panel systems. Available in a 5kg polyjerry, Bostik FIX A320 TACK can be used on concrete, cementitious screeds, asphalt, terrazzo, chipboard, hardboard, plywood, smoothing compounds and existing floor coverings, e.g. thermoplastic tiles, PVC or linoleum. It's also suitable for use with warm water underfloor heating systems where the floor surface temperature does not exceed +27°C.
breadcrumb: Bostik FIX A320 TACK Carpet Tile Tackifier Adhesive – 5kg

name: Wickes Hoxton Patterned Porcelain Wall & Floor Tile - 300 x 300mm
description: The Hoxton porcelain tile features a classical encaustic tile pattern produced with a French inspired colour palette. A pattern reminiscent of a typical “maison de ville” found on the French Riviera, this geometric design is enchanting whilst being restrained. The intricacy of the design is made up primarily by a pastel blue that gives the floor a welcoming feel with a modern air. With it being a porcelain tile, it can more than withstand the wear and tear of modern living and is perfectly suited to rooms such as kitchens, entrance halls, conservatories or bathrooms. This tile is suitable for walls as well as floors and with that in mind can be used as a focal feature behind a washbasin, a bath or on the back wall of a shower. It can also be used as a splash-back in a kitchen.

name: Karcher Ultra Foam Cleaner - 1L
description: Karcher Ultra Foam Cleaner is designed with an extra foam booster for an even deeper clean. The new active dirt dissolver, effortlessly removes oily and greasy dirt as well as typical vehicle and road dirt. Formulated to produce a high foam result with thick coverage and an active cleaning performance. Karcher's detergents have huge advantages, not just for cleaning around your home but for the environment too. No aggressive tensides or ingredients that are considered harmful such as mineral oil and palm oil are used. All tensides used in Karcher detergents are biodegradable, and many ingredients are obtained from natural resources, from coconuts to beeswax. The bottle your detergent comes in is made from 45% recycling material, and is 100% recyclable.
breadcrumb_str: Home > Products > Gardening & Landscaping Supplies > Garden Power & Hand Tools > Garden Power Tools & Accessories > Jet & Pressure Washers > Karcher Ultra Foam Cleaner - 1L

name: Sika FastFix Deep Grey All Weather Jointing Paving Compound - 14kg
description: The Sika FastFix All Weather Jointing Paving Compound is a self-setting paving jointing compound that provides the ideal solution to perfect pointing on paving, paths and patios. Suitable for use on all joints from 5mm wide and 20mm deep, FastFix is quick and simple to apply. There is no mixing needed, and it can be applied in all weather conditions. The unique formula contains active resin technology for advanced durability, meaning it won't shrink or crack over time. It creates a natural barrier to weed growth, but is also highly water-permeable so you won't have to worry about pooling. Sika FastFix can be used on a range of different paving including footpaths, stone setts, cobbles and Indian sandstone slabs. Once opened, it can be stored in water and reused to reduce waste.
breadcrumb: Sika FastFix Deep Grey All Weather Jointing Paving Compound - 14kg
breadcrumb_str: Home > Products > Gardening & Landscaping Supplies > Paving & Walling > Patio Grout & Pointing > Sika FastFix Deep Grey All Weather Jointing Paving Compound - 14kg

name: Bristan Frammento Cold Start Small Basin Mixer & Clicker Waste with Installation Service - Brushed Brass
description: The Bristan Frammento Mixer Tap is a sleek and slim tap with a fresh, modern feel. This tap comes with the Bristan installation service and should only be selected if you want it to be installed by an engineer from Bristan. Please read the Bristan terms & conditions below. Designed using Cold Start technology whilst maintaining a beautiful design. The cold start technology means that hot water is only activated when the tap lever is moved from the central position. Saves your boiler being switched on unnecessarily. Price shown is for Tap and Installation service only.

name: Makita DTD153Z 18V LXT Cordless Brushless Impact Driver - Bare
description: The Makita DTD153Z 18V LXT Brushless Impact Driver - Bare is a high torque (170Nm) makes it perfect for all driving applications. The DTD153 cordless impact driver features high operation efficiency with a 170 Nm max torque and 4 pole brushless motor. It's keyless single sleeve ¼” hex chuck accepts M5 – M16 standard bolts and M4 – M8 machine screws, making it ideal for repetitive screwdriving. Supplied without the battery & charger but it is available separately see SKU 289711.

name: Stormsaver Rainwater Harvesting System 1500L
description: Rainwater harvesting works by taking the rain from roofs and filtering out leaves and debris, before storing the water underground in the main storage tank. The water is then pumped into the property to be used for non-drinking applications e.g. flushing toilets, washing machines and garden watering.

name: Primaflow Brass Compression Straight Coupling 15mm - Pack of 2
description: Primaflow Brass Compression Straight Coupling 15mm - Pack of 2 is designed to efficiently join multiple lengths of 15mm pipework together in a straight line. Compression plumbing fittings are a popular choice for both professional plumbers and DIY enthusiasts due to their ease of use and versatility. Typically consisting of a nut, a compression olive and the fitting body. The olive is compressed onto the pipe when the nut is tightened, creating a seal without any need for soldering.
breadcrumb: Primaflow Brass Compression Straight Coupling 15mm - Pack of 2
